personal.title: Senior PHP/Laravel Developer
personal.about_me: Senior PHP/Laravel Developer with over 6 years of experience delivering scalable web applications. Skilled in Laravel, Vue.js, GraphQL, and Node.js with strong expertise in REST APIs, real-time applications, and database optimization. Proven track record of building enterprise-grade solutions, mentoring junior developers, and thriving in remote Agile teams.

projects.name: Enova Bids – Real-time Auction Platform
projects.description:
• Built a real-time auction system with WebSockets delivering sub-100ms latency.
• Scaled platform to handle thousands of concurrent bidders across multiple auctions.
• Integrated Redis-based caching to optimize real-time bidding operations.
• Designed React.js UI with live updates, notifications, and bidding dashboards.
• Implemented secure authentication, payment integration, and audit trails.
• Collaborated with distributed team following Agile/Scrum practices.

projects.name: E-vent – Event Management System
projects.description:
• Designed and developed GraphQL APIs for event scheduling, sessions, and attendees.
• Built Vue.js dashboards with interactive scheduling, live updates, and reporting tools.
• Implemented role-based access control for organizers, sponsors, and participants.
• Optimized backend queries and caching, reducing load times by 35%.
• Integrated real-time notifications, ticket booking, and payments.
• Increased system reliability and scalability for events with thousands of users.

projects.name: KwelaApp – Ticketing & Booking Platform
projects.description:
• Developed complete ticketing and booking system with secure payment processing.
• Built REST APIs enabling mobile app integration and third-party services.
• Created organizer dashboards with detailed reporting and analytics.
• Designed booking flow reducing checkout friction, increasing conversions by 25%.
• Implemented refund, cancellation, and automated email notification workflows.
• Enhanced security with token-based authentication and rate limiting.

projects.name: Laugh Factory – Entertainment Platform
projects.description:
• Maintained and extended a high-traffic entertainment platform serving millions monthly.
• Migrated legacy modules, optimized backend performance and SEO rankings.
• Built content management features for comedy shows, videos, and events.
• Improved mobile responsiveness and front-end UX using jQuery and Bootstrap.
• Automated content publishing workflows for editors and admins.

projects.name: Geo Nova Labs – Geo Data Platform
projects.description:
• Developed backend infrastructure for large scientific geospatial datasets.
• Designed REST APIs consumed by researchers and data visualization tools.
• Implemented data security measures with role-based access and logging.
• Optimized PostgreSQL queries and indexing for big-data performance.
• Improved documentation, onboarding guides, and user adoption.

projects.name: Abstract.index.ae – Corporate Events
projects.description:
• Built enterprise platform for managing international conferences and exhibitions.
• Designed multi-user dashboards for sponsors, exhibitors, attendees, and organizers.
• Automated event workflows including registration, scheduling, and ticketing.
• Integrated Docker-based deployment for scalable hosting.
• Supported 10k+ active participants across multiple events.

projects.name: Market.index.ae – B2B Marketplace
projects.description:
• Developed a secure B2B marketplace with vendor, buyer, and admin dashboards.
• Designed GraphQL APIs for real-time product listings, bids, and orders.
• Integrated payment gateways, invoice generation, and financial reports.
• Optimized database queries to handle thousands of concurrent product views.

workExperience.description:
Developed enterprise-grade Laravel apps integrated with Vue.js.
Built secure REST APIs supporting thousands of daily users.
Implemented unit testing and CI/CD pipelines (reduced errors by 40%).
Collaborated with Agile teams to deliver projects on time.

• Developed enterprise-grade Laravel apps integrated with Vue.js.
• Built secure REST APIs supporting thousands of daily users.
• Implemented unit testing and CI/CD pipelines (reduced errors by 40%).
• Collaborated with Agile teams to deliver projects on time.

• Delivered full-stack solutions using Laravel, Vue.js, MySQL.
• Mentored 4 junior developers, introduced coding standards.
• Optimized queries/caching, cutting response time by 30%.
• Built Vue.js UIs improving customer engagement.
